action.reasoning: Observation: iter7 two-stage got 0.5273 bal_acc (down from best 0.5421), few_shot dropped to 0.207 from 0.265; stage2 val fluctuated wildly (0.317->0.512) and best was only 0.516. Curves show poor loss behavior in stage2. Analysis: Optimizer/LR mismatch in stage2 (reused low LR or unstable SGD 0.1), label_smoothing hurt tail, insufficient epochs or bad freezing. cRT-style decoupled training is promising but needs cleaner separation (dedicated high-LR SGD+momentum for linear head only, strong 1/counts balancing in stage2, no smoothing there). ResNet50+pretrain+RandAug+Focal stable for stage1. Decision: Rewrite train.py with clean 2-stage (stage1: 50ep Focal+AdamW5e-4+1/sqrt sampler+cosine; stage2: freeze backbone, 30ep CE+SGD lr=0.2+mom=0.9+1/counts sampler+cosine), proper best-saving by val_acc across stages, log only to metrics.jsonl. This should recover few-shot and push bal_acc >0.55. Run then immediately submit_eval (follows >20ep rule, ~5min iter fits budget).
